upasargachandrika.example_text: 'tezAM (lokAnAm) tapyamAnAnAM rasAn prAvfhad agniM pfTivyA vAyumantarikzAdAdityaM divaH' (CAM॰u॰4.17.1) nirakAsayadityAha
'pra hi kratuM vfhaTo yaM vanuTo raDrasya sTo yajamAnasya codO' (f॰2.30.6) pravfhaTaH=utsAdayaTaH DvaMsayaTaH
'prajApati rlokAnaByatapat tezAM tapyamAnAnAM rasAnprAvfhat' (CAM0 u0 4171) prAvfhat udaharat
'yamevAmuM trayyE vidyAyE tejo rasaM prAvfhat' (SAM0 brA0 611) ukto'rTaH
'martyaH pravfhya Darmyam' (kaWopa0 1213) DarmasADanaM DarmasADyaM vedaM SarIraM pravfhya pfTak kftvA prArabDAvasAnasamaye parityajyeti yAvat
'A yayAma saMvavarha granTIMScakAra te dfQAn' (aTarva0 933) saMvavarha=saMyojayAmAsa saMSlizwAMScakAra
'yaTA mahAsuhayaH sEnDavapaqvISaSaNkUnsaMvfhedevaM hEvemAn prARAnsaMvavarha' (Sa0 brA0 149213) saMvfhet=Avfhet=udDaret=samudDaret
'ta ime lokA vyavfhyanta vi yajYo vyavfhyata' (jE0 brA0 1155) vyavfhyanta pfTagaBavan
'yakzmaM SIrzaRyaM mastizkAjjihvAyA vivfhAmi te' (aTarva0 3331) vivfhAmi pravfhAmi udyacCAmi udDarAmi pfTakkaromi
'viSvA idaryo aBidipsvo mfDo bfhaspatirvi vavarhA raTAM iva' (f0 12313) vivavarha=ujjahAra vidadAra visaMhitAScakAra
'mezA vi varhi mA yugaM vi SAri' (f0 35317) mezA=mA IzA mA vivarhi mA sma BaNgamApat
'yaTezIkAM muYjAd vivfhedevaM sarvasmAtpApmano vyavfhan' (Sa0 brA0 43316) vyavfhan apodaharan pfTagakurvan
'somA rudrA vivfhataM me vizUcIm' (aTarva0 7431) vivfhataM vinASayatam apabADeTAm
'yadvE yajYasya miTyA kriyate vyasya vfhanti' (Sa0 brA0 1934) vivfhanti apacCindanti
'tatkarma vivfhyeta sA paricakzA' (Sa0 brA0 13514) vivfhyeta KaRqaSaH kriyeta paricakzA'nAdaraH parirvarjane
'sarveREvEtad Bizajyati yatkiM ca vivfQaM yajYasya' (Sa0 brA0 14322) vivfQ0a viparyastamAkulam
'yad vivfQaM tat sandaDAti' (Sa0 brA0 17422) uktacara evArTaH
'sa indra izwakAmAvfhata' (mE0 saM0 169 tE0 saM0 1124) udapAwayadityarTaH
'saraGA vA aSvasya sakTyAvfhat' (paYca0 brA0 214) Avfhat AcCidya gfhItavatI sakTipradeSe vraRamakarodityarTaH
'sa cApi keSO harirudvavarha SuklamekamaparaM cApi kfzRam' (BA0 Adi0 19732) udvavarha=ujjahAra
